title: Jinja 3.1.6 Environments, Layouts, Autoescape, and Contracts · Language Clinic: Inheritance Components
summary: Templates are constructed from author text, autoescape is assumed rather than configured, missing values render empty, safe filters spread, inheritance cycles hide layout ownership, and logic consumes arbitrary objects. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the inheritance components increment in strict autoescaped layout and component system. Learne…
objectives: Use base layouts, blocks, includes, and macros with explicit ownership, required regions, naming, and bounded inheritance.
Pass a documented immutable view model instead of filesystem objects, services, secrets, or unrestricted application state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-templates-jinja-3
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-templates-jinja-3.
# Case 5798: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity.
# Changed case: insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic.
def worked_static_site_templates_jinja_3(templates: int = 6, rendered: int = 6, autoescaped: bool = True, strict_undefined: bool = True, unsafe_safe_filters: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "readerworked3",
        "source5798",
        "parse3dekrow",
        "routeworked35798",
        "artifact5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if templates < 1 or rendered < 0:
        return False, rendered, "template-count"
    if rendered != templates:
        return False, rendered, "template-coverage"
    if not autoescaped or not strict_undefined:
        return False, rendered, "environment-policy"
    if unsafe_safe_filters > 0:
        return False, unsafe_safe_filters, "safe-boundary"
    assert rendered == templates
    return True, rendered, "strict-layout-system"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic pure-Python static-site decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected source, parse, route, render, asset, accessibility, cache, deployment, or recovery case, then state which filesystem, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validator, browser, GitHub, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-inheritance-components-1npwme
# Competency: ssg-inheritance-components.
# Case 5769: a compromised-content recovery rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval.
# Changed case: publish below a project subpath and verify every internal URL, fragment, asset, feed, and canonical.
def evidence_ssg_inheritance_components_1npwme(templates: int = 6, rendered: int = 6, autoescaped: bool = True, strict_undefined: bool = True, unsafe_safe_filters: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1npwme = "1npwme-emwpn1-5769"
    assert evidence_variant_1npwme
    evidence_axes_1npwme = (
        "reader1npwme",
        "source5769",
        "parseemwpn1",
        "route1npwme5769",
        "artifact57691npwme",
        "recoveryemwpn15769",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1npwme)) == 6
    if templates < 1 or rendered < 0:
        return False, rendered, "template-count"
    if rendered != templates:
        return False, rendered, "template-coverage"
    if not autoescaped or not strict_undefined:
        return False, rendered, "environment-policy"
    if unsafe_safe_filters > 0:
        return False, unsafe_safe_filters, "safe-boundary"
    assert rendered == templates
    return True, rendered, "strict-layout-system"
